mapper.select:
SELECT AREA_ID as "areaId", REGION_ID as "regionId", SEARCH_TYPE as "searchType", NAME as "name", MAP_X as "mapX", MAP_Y as "mapY", CATEGORY as "category", ADDRESS as "address", ROAD_ADDRESS as "roadAddress", LINK as "link", TELEPHONE as "telephone", DESCRIPTION as "description", BOOKMARK_COUNT as "bookmarkCount", CREATE_DATE as "createDate", LATEST_DATE as "latestDate", STATUS as "status" FROM AREA
REGION_ID = #{regionId}
